title: Queue pressure trend
query_text: How has queue pressure changed over the last 8 hours?

eval_criteria.gold_answer: GPU queue pressure has risen steadily from 2 pending jobs at 01:00 to 35 pending jobs at 09:00 UTC, while GPU utilisation has held at 100% throughout. Standard partition utilisation climbed from 72% to 94%. The trend shows accelerating job submission against a fixed capacity ceiling.
